reviews.comment:
La atencion buena lo que si el de la estacion de servicio se la paso hablando con un cliente y no atendia a los que esperaban la comida del ful muy buena al igual que el cafe los baños muy limpios

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but the gas station attendant spent most of his time talking to another customer and didn't attend to those waiting. The food at the restaurant was very good, as was the coffee. The bathrooms were very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJOWZyeEVnEAE

reviews.comment:
El servicio de un ACA , no se por qué , pero es otra cosa , muy cálido , el trato de la gente , es ejemplar !
Aguante el ACA

(Translated by Google)
The service at an ACA, I don't know why, but it's something else entirely—very warm and welcoming. The way people treat you is exemplary! Long live ACA!

reviews.comment:
Excelente como hace muchos años...pero pongan un empleado más en el kiosco y/o cafeteria a la mañana x q las chicas (SON UNAS GENIAS) y no dan abasto

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, just like it was many years ago...but please put another employee in the kiosk and/or cafeteria in the morning because the girls (ARE GENIUSES) can't keep up.
